directions_tried.name: Balaban RG program precision map
directions_tried.outcome: Complete map of 14-paper series. UV stability achieved on T4. Two-tier gap: Tier 1 (observables, uniqueness, OS axioms) potentially tractable; Tier 2 (mass gap, infinite volume) needs new ideas.

directions_tried.name: Constructive QFT 2D/3D vs 4D failure modes
directions_tried.outcome: 8 constructions cataloged. 3 specific 4D failure modes identified. Key reframing: UV problem solved (MRS 1993), entire difficulty is IR. Asymptotic freedom expected to prevent triviality but unproven.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Precision map of Balaban's RG program for 4D lattice Yang-Mills
explorations_completed.key_finding: Balaban achieves UV stability on T4 but not observables, uniqueness, mass gap, or infinite volume. Two-tier gap structure.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Map constructive QFT successes in 2D/3D and failure modes in 4D
explorations_completed.key_finding: UV problem solved (MRS 1993). Entire difficulty is IR. 3 specific failure modes: cluster expansion divergence, large field problem, infinite RG convergence.
